title: Nicola Spring Half Moon Coir Door Mat - 60 x 40cm - Rainbow Pastel - Pack of 1 - Decorative Indoor Front Door Floor Mat Entry Dirt Trapper Rug Outdoor Boot Scraper Non Slip Backing Doormat
features: Durable Coir Construction – Made from natural coir coconut fibres, this doormat boasts impressive strength and durability, efficiently removing dirt, mud, dust, and debris from your shoes, keeping your floors clean with every step.

Non-Slip PVC Backing – The sturdy non-slip PVC backing keeps the mat securely in place while trapping moisture and water, preventing spills from reaching your interior carpets and ensuring safety for all who enter.

Vibrant Radiant Rainbow Design – Featuring a colourful radiant rainbow design, this doormat adds a joyful touch to your doorstep, enhancing any entryway with its playful and welcoming aesthetic that complements both modern and traditional decor.

Two Convenient Sizes – Available in two sizes, 40 x 60cm and 60 x 90cm, this doormat fits a variety of spaces, whether it’s for a cozy apartment or a spacious home, providing versatility for all your outdoor and indoor needs.

Easy to Clean and Maintain – Keeping this mat spotless is simple! Just hang it outside, beat off dirt with a broom, then brush it with water and lay flat to dry. Dimensions: Width: 60cm, Depth: 1.6cm, Height: 40cm – practical and easy to maintain.
description: Product Description Add a touch of porch-side personality to your home and keep interior floors and carpets clean with our Nicola Spring Door and Welcome Mats. High Fibre Diet Crafted from coconut fibres, our Coir Door Mats possess a natural strength and durability perfectly suited to scrubbing dirt, dust and grime from the soles of your shoes. A selection of striking designs and decorations lets you perfectly show off your style to guests and passers-by, while the robust PVC backing ensures non-slip suitability to all seasons. When the Going Gets Tough Our Polypropylene and Rubber Door Mats provide a sleek, low-profile finish, perfect for offices and more formal locations. A series of subtle, narrow ridges and channels offer an efficient scrubbing solution that is also easy to clean. Because we appreciate that every doorway is different, our collection includes door mats in a variety of shapes and sizes designed to perfectly cater to your needs.
